pack.dark_soldier_armor.name: DS Expansion
description.satsu.shoulder_chest_beam: Release a high energy triple beam from the arc reactor and the shoulder cannons
description.iron.man.mark.52_d: The Mark 52‑D is designed to excel in any environment, combining solid durability, extreme adaptability, and limited nano capabilities.(Maximum energy:95200)
description.iron.man.mark.58_d: The Mark 58-D is designed for containment-focused operations, utilizing non-lethal systems and tactical weaponry while retaining full offensive capability. Equipped with a portable deployment system similar to the Mark V. (Maximum energy:80058)
description.iron.man.class.hybrid_class: This type of armor is characterized by combining nano-systems and weaponry with conventional armor systems and a chassis. Nanotechnology plays a reinforcing role in all the systems of the classic armor, allowing the creation of certain nano-weaponry supported by a solid, classical structure.
satsu.iron.man.addon.text.ia.interaction: <Y.O.R.C.H> Hi buddy, what do you need?
<Y.O.R.C.H> Night vision deactivated, eturning to standard vision.
<Y.O.R.C.H> Scanning the area for potential threats, detection systems online.
<Y.O.R.C.H> Enemy scan deactivated, detection systems offline.
<Y.O.R.C.H> Here are the current energy levels, all systems are operating at optimal conditions.
<Y.O.R.C.H> Energy levels hidden, back to standard view.
<Y.O.R.C.H> Sentry mode activated, defense systems on standby
satsu.iron.man.addon.text.ia.warning.ene: <Y.O.R.C.H> Sir, energy is in a critical state. I recommend immediate recharge to prevent shutdown.
satsu.iron.man.addon.text.ia.interaction: <Y.O.R.C.H> Rerouting power to thrusters, sir. All systems are operating within established parameters.
<Y.O.R.C.H> Power flow normalized. Continuing under optimal conditions.
satsu.iron.man.addon.text.ia.increase.mi: <Y.O.R.C.H> Mining speed activated, sir. Performance optimized.
satsu.iron.man.addon.text.ia.decrease.mi: <Y.O.R.C.H> Mining speed deactivated, sir. Returning to standard mode.
satsu.iron.man.addon.text.ia.interaction: <Y.O.R.C.H> Recharge mode activated, sir. Energy system optimized for maximum efficiency.
<Y.O.R.C.H> Recharge mode deactivated, sir. System returning to normal operation.
